title: Rustom Sohrab
writer: Kumar Ramsay, Qamar Jalalabadi, Masood Mashhadi
plot: Powerful and mighty Rustom Zabuli (Prithviraj Kapoor) of Iran while on a visit to India,rescues a horse-drawn carriage of Shehzadi Tehmina (Suraiya). Impressed by his strength, the Shehzadi offers to employ him, but Rustom refuses...
